Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
from pypdf import PdfReader
reader = PdfReader\('C:/personalproject/aws-ai-practitioner/course-material/AWS Certified AI Practitioner Slides v17.pdf'\)
for i in range\(52, 75\):
    text = reader.pages[i].extract_text\(\)
    text = text.encode\('ascii', 'ignore'\).decode\('ascii'\)
    print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---'\)
    print\(text\)
    print\(\)
")
